TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Charlie_Beasley, title = Charlie_Beasley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Charlie_Beasley} }

S.FORM: Charlie Beasley Charlie Beasley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas te 1945, byacing te 9 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Oklahoma, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1967 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Cincinnati Royals. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Charlie Beasley Charlie Beasley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) kawas te 1945, byacing te 9 ru 23 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Oklahoma, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 196 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1967 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Cincinnati Royals. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨħarlie βeas~ɕlej ʦ~ʨħarlie βeas~ɕlej s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa oklaħoma, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨinʦ~ʨinnati rojals~ɕ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
